name: John Lindsay
abstract: John Vliet Lindsay (; November 24, 1921 – December 19, 2000) was an American politician and lawyer. During his political career, Lindsay was a U.S.

concerts.label: 28th Commemoration of the Warsaw Ghetto Uprising

about_quotes.speaker: Nellie Lutcher
about_quotes.evidence: I remembered them by name, but I didn't know them as well as I knew Mingus... sitting, just sitting there, talking to Mayor Lindsay

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Mingus
about_quotes.evidence: Saw you following Mayor -- on television one time, saw you with your band, following Mayor Lindsay.
